message:
fix(node): bound quarantine state_history pushes, fix clippy needless borrow

- quarantine.rs: 6 unbounded `record.state_history.push()` calls converted
  to `push_bounded()` with MAX_STATE_HISTORY=256, preventing memory exhaustion
  via repeated state transitions on a single quarantine record
- verifier_toolkit.rs: remove needless `&` in `hasher.update(&[u8::from(passed)])`
  to fix clippy::needless_borrows_for_generic_args

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
